pattern_name: Pre-flight ID availability sweep before allocating any new D-IH / persona / capability / process / pattern ID
acceptance_criteria_human: A human or AIC role_owner runs a Grep + Read sweep across DECISION_REGISTER.csv (for D-IH-NN-X), PERSONA_REGISTRY.csv (for PERSONA-* IDs), CAPABILITY_REGISTRY.csv (for CAP-* IDs), process_list.csv (for hol_*_dtp_* IDs), and PEOPLE_DESIGN_PATTERN_REGISTRY.csv (for pattern_* IDs) BEFORE allocating any new ID; 1-3 minutes per ID allocation; surfaces collisions or reserved-but-unminted IDs (e.g., from informal scratchpad reservations) so the new allocation lands in a clean slot. Pattern prevents the D-IH-86-CY collision class of failure (where an ID was mentally reserved but not yet appended to DECISION_REGISTER, then re-used silently for a different decision).
